title: Array append +=
goal: Use `items += [{ slot = 8, material = EMERALD }]` to append; the resolved `items` should have both entries.
hints: Don't touch the first `items = [...]`. Add a new `items += [...]` line below it.
The right side is still a normal array literal - `[{ slot = 8, material = EMERALD }]`.

ru.title: Array append +=
ru.goal: Используй `items += [{ slot = 8, material = EMERALD }]`; в результирующем `items` должно быть обе записи.
hints: Не трогай первый `items = [...]`. Допиши под ним новую строку `items += [...]`.
Справа обычный массив - `[{ slot = 8, material = EMERALD }]`.
